title: erythroxylum andrei
intro: Erythroxylum andrei, also known as the "Andean coca", is a plant species native to the Andean region of South America, belonging to the Erythroxylum genus of coca plants. The plant contains alkaloids with medicinal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat fever, headaches, and inflammation. The health benefits of Erythroxylum andrei include its potential to alleviate pain, reduce fatigue, and provide relief from altitude sickness. Erythroxylum andrei can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
